parsed.availability_comment: Recent public reporting shows Allen active in New Zealand duty in 2026; no adverse KKR availability report found.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/suspension/tournament-unavailability found for the published first-phase fixtures only.
parsed.followup_reason: KKR's actual keeper/opener choice between Allen and Seifert remains unresolved before the March 29, 2026 opener.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: KKR bought both Allen and Seifert, while also carrying other stronger overseas XI candidates like Narine, Green, Pathirana, Mustafizur, Powell and Rachin.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Heavy overseas slot pressure; Allen competes mainly with Tim Seifert for a WK-opening role and also against locked-in overseas balance picks.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Squad-listed overseas WK-opener, but no clear evidence he is ahead of Tim Seifert in KKR's first-choice XI.
